entities.createSql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL, `amount` REAL NOT NULL, `category` TEXT NOT NULL, `dateEpochDay` INTEGER NOT NULL, `satisfaction` INTEGER NOT NULL, `comment` TEXT, `createdAtEpochMs` INTEGER NOT NULL)

indices.name: index_expenses_dateEpochDay
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_expenses_dateEpochDay` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`dateEpochDay`)

indices.name: index_expenses_category
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_expenses_category` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`category`)

indices.name: index_expenses_satisfaction
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_expenses_satisfaction` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`satisfaction`)

setupQueries: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS room_master_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,identity_hash TEXT)
